text: 1. **API type definition**: The authoritative `Deployment` struct is defined in `api--v0.32.0/apps/v1/types.go` at line 359. This is the stable v1 version (apps/v1); older beta versions exist in apps/v1beta1, apps/v1beta2, and extensions/v1beta1 but apps/v1 is canonical. 2. **Client-side code pattern**: The canonical Go example for creating a Deployment using client-go is at `client-go--v0.32.0/examples/create-update-delete-deployment/main.go`. It demonstrates the full CRUD lifecycle (Create, List, Update, Delete) with proper retry-on-conflict handling. 3. **Developer documentation**: The README explaining the deployment workflow is at `client-go--v0.32.0/examples/create-update-delete-deployment/README.md`, which walks through each operation step by step with verification instructions.
